expectations.text: The response mentions /branch as the in-session way to fork
expectations.evidence: Explicitly states: 'Claude Code does not have a built-in fork session command'. Does not mention /branch at all.

expectations.text: The response mentions claude --resume <session-id> --fork-session as the CLI way
expectations.evidence: Mentions --resume and --continue but NOT --fork-session. Suggests workarounds instead of the actual feature.

expectations.text: The response explains that forking creates a copy of the conversation that diverges from that point
expectations.evidence: Describes manual workarounds (two terminals, --resume) but never describes true forking behavior since it doesn't know the feature exists.
